title: Shannon Choo - Financial Advisory Manager & Entrepreneur
text:
# Shannon Choo

Financial Advisory Manager & Entrepreneur | Advocating Personal Growth & Financial Knowledge. Interested in Public Affairs, Politics, and Business

Financial Advisory Manager at [Financial Alliance Pte Ltd](https://www.linkedin.com/company/financialalliance)

Singapore, Singapore (SG)

303 connections • 314 followers

## About

In Singapore, the focus on being diligent employees from 9 to 5 often overshadows preparation for life beyond our working years. Many prioritize salary increments, yet spend impulsively on immediate comforts like gym memberships or extravagant renovations, neglecting crucial planning for life post-65, or even earlier. After over a decade in the workforce, I discovered that the true objective of a career is to gain the freedom to work on our own terms as early as possible. This freedom is only attainable by saving and leveraging money effectively. As an Independent Financial Advisor (IFA), I specialize in empowering young executives to strategically manage their finances, securing their families and accumulating resources to prevent becoming the ‘sandwich’ generation. Additionally, I collaborate with senior corporate executives, guiding them through the transition to retirement after their fulfilling yet often draining careers. My approach centers on 𝐀𝐟𝐟𝐢𝐧𝐢𝐭𝐲, 𝐂𝐨𝐦𝐩𝐞𝐭𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐲, 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐓𝐫𝐮𝐬𝐭, forming the pillars of how I foster robust and meaningful relationships with my clients.

Total Experience: 13 years and 11 months

## Experience

### [Financial Alliance Pte Ltd](https://www.linkedin.com/company/financialalliance)

#### Financial Advisory Manager (Current)

Jan 2024 - Present (2 years and 2 months) in Singapore

The title of manager is just a title: it means I advise more clients now, which was what I was already doing as a consultant. On top of that I now juggle several other aspects of the business. I manage investment portfolios, and the expectations and emotions that come with it. I manage a team to service customer accounts, and pay salaries. I manage my sales pipeline end to end with chatbots, multiple CRM platforms and periodic content. But all these are just multipliers to what I was doing before; helping people be more secure and successful through unbiased professional financial advice. Show less

Department: Finance & Accounting • Level: Manager

#### Senior Consultant

Nov 2021 - Apr 2024 (2 years and 5 months) in Singapore

Department: Consulting • Level: Senior

Financial Alliance Pte Ltd is a Financial Services company. Financial Alliance is Singapore's leading financial adviser, offering impartial financial advice and best-suited financial plans. They help clients achieve their financial goals through holistic, unbiased, and professional financial planning services. They serve individuals and families, business owners, and corporates, helping them achieve their potential while managing financial risks. Financial Alliance Pte Ltd employs 337 people (+2.3% YoY, +11 people), founded in 2002. Headquartered in Singapore, operates in 5 countries (including Malaysia, China, United States, and India).

### Senior Financial Consultant at [Prudential Assurance Company Singapore](https://www.linkedin.com/company/prudential-assurance-company-singapore)

May 2019 - Apr 2022 (2 years and 11 months)

Plan and Provide comprehensive and individually-curated personal financial plans to individuals and business-owners in the areas including but not limited to; estate-planning, risk-management and insurance optimisation, investment portfolio.
- Senior Financial Planner (2021)
- Associate Specialist Estate Planner, ASEP® (2021)
- Associate Financial Planner (2020)
- IBF Qualified (Level 1) Certificate in Financial Needs Analysis and Plan Construction (2020)
- Fast Track Elite Qualifier (2019)
- Quality Club Elite Qualifier (2019)
- Quality Club Elite Qualifier (2020) Show less

Department: Finance & Accounting • Level: Senior

Prudential Assurance Company Singapore is a Financial Services company. Prudential Singapore is a life insurance and protection company in Singapore. They have been serving the financial and protection needs of Singapore for over 85 years. They offer the best insurance plans to help individuals save for better future and also invest in investment plans to strengthen their financial condition. Prudential Assurance Company Singapore employs 3,470 people (+2.4% YoY, +136 people) and has an annual revenue of $5.0B-$10.0B, founded in 1931. Headquartered in Singapore, Central Region, Singapore, operates in 22 countries (including Malaysia, Indonesia, India, Uganda, and Hong Kong).

### [Federal Express Singapore](https://www.linkedin.com/company/federal-express-singapore)

#### Operations Manager

May 2017 - Mar 2019 (1 year and 10 months)

Build strong team performance for LMD (Last-Mile-Delivery) in East-Central zone. Manage various operational KPIs for upper management to deliver outstanding results, contributing to excellent FedEx regional performance.
- Maintain operational efficiency in East zone with 30-strong delivery workforce (2017-2019)
- Redesign of legacy LMD (Last-mile delivery) operations to encompass vendor and employee workforce (2018-2019)
- Plan and push Organisational projects to reduce loss of business due to Churn (2017)
- Support Business Development initiatives to drive Customer Automation using digital platform instead of legacy physical Airway Bills. (2018) Show less

Department: Operations • Level: Manager

#### Sales Account Manager

Oct 2015 - May 2017 (1 year and 7 months)

Curate and deliver shipping and digital solutions for Customers requiring end-to-end international delivery and customs clearance. Drive FedEx market growth within Singapore by building beneficial and endearing customer relationships.
- Intra-Asia Awards, driving customer segment growth in Asia-lane, lightweight shipments (2017)
- FedEx Sales Challenge winner in driving Asia-EU lane (2015)
- Sales Automation Challenge winner, driving Customer Adoption of Automation tools (2016 & 2017)
- FedEx APAC Sales Awards for “Golden Attitude” and “Best Corporate Presenter” (201 Show less

Department: Sales • Level: Manager

Federal Express Singapore is a Transportation, Logistics, Supply Chain and Storage company. FedEx offers worldwide express delivery services and solutions tailored to your shipping needs, including to and from Singapore. Federal Express Singapore employs 37 people (+2.9% YoY, +2 people), founded in 1984. Headquartered in Singapore, with presence in Philippines, United States, and Malaysia.

### Air Warfare Office at [Ministry of Defence of Singapore](https://www.linkedin.com/company/ministry-of-defence_singapore)

Jan 2008 - Aug 2011 (3 years and 7 months) in Singapore

Department: Operations • Level: Specialist

Ministry of Defence of Singapore is a government agency. MINDEF Singapore is a Singapore government agency that enhances Singapore's peace and security through deterrence and diplomacy. They aim to secure a swift and decisive victory over the aggressor. Ministry of Defence of Singapore employs 2,717 people (+8.4% YoY, +543 people) and has an annual revenue of $310.0K. operates in 24 countries (including Singapore, Cameroon, France, Malaysia, and Peru).

## Education

### Magna Cum Laude at [Singapore Management University](https://www.linkedin.com/school/singapore-management-university)

2011 - 2015 (4 years) in Singapore, Singapore

Singapore Management University is a higher education institution. Singapore Management University employs 2,527 people (+4.6% YoY, +183 people) and has an annual revenue of $125.0M. Headquartered in Singapore, Singapore, operates in 34 countries (including United States, Indonesia, India, Vietnam, and China).

## Licenses & Certifications

### AESP by [ProWealth LLC](https://linkedin.com/company/prowealth-llc)

### Certificate of Financial Needs Analysis and Plan Construction by [IBFSG - The Institute of Banking & Finance Singapore](https://linkedin.com/company/the-institute-of-banking-&-finance-singapore)

### CMFAS, M5, M8, M9, M9A, HI by Singapore College of Insurance Ltd

# Shannon Choo

AI Engineer Intern @ YTL AI Labs | City Lead @ AI Tinkerers | Co-founder @ AI Hackerdorm | Prev Intern @ Software Eng & Venture Capital | University Malaya Valedictorian

City Lead at [AI Tinkerers Kuala Lumpur](https://www.linkedin.com/company/ai-tinkerers-kuala-lumpur)

WP. Kuala Lumpur, Federal Territory of Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia (MY)

500 connections • 1,009 followers

## About

Total Experience: 1 year and 8 months

## Experience

Feb 2026 - Present (1 month)

Department: General Management

AI Tinkerers Kuala Lumpur is a Technology, Information and Internet company. AI Tinkerers Kuala Lumpur employs 1 person.

### Co-founder & President at [AI Hackerdorm](https://www.linkedin.com/company/ai-hackerdorm) (Current)

Aug 2025 - Present (7 months) in Kuala Lumpur, MY

A student-first community of builders. We organize weekly tech building sessions.

Department: General Management • Level: President/Vice President

AI Hackerdorm is a nonprofit organization. AI Hackerdorm employs 11 people, founded in 2025. Headquartered in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, with presence in Australia.

### Software Engineer Intern at [Newell Road](https://www.linkedin.com/company/newellroad)

Apr 2025 - Jul 2025 (3 months) in Kuala Lumpur, MY

Department: Engineering and Technical • Level: Intern

Newell Road is a Data Infrastructure and Analytics company. Newell Road is an AI-powered market intelligence platform designed to supercharge prospecting, deal sourcing, and due diligence with ML-powered actionable insights to drive anti-fragile decisions. Newell Road employs 3 people (-28.6% YoY, -2 people), founded in 2024. Headquartered in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, with presence in Japan. Has $110.0K in total funding.

### Operations Intern at [GetSolar](https://www.linkedin.com/company/solaraitechnologies)

Dec 2024 - Feb 2025 (2 months) in Singapore, SG

Department: Operations • Level: Intern

GetSolar is a Services for Renewable Energy company. GetSolar is a company that helps homeowners and businesses make the switch to solar. They provide solar panels for homes and businesses, with a focus on renewable energy certificates. They offer rent-to-own solar solutions with zero upfront costs and aim to align with Singapore's vision of a zero-carbon future. GetSolar employs 22 people (+17.4% YoY, +4 people) and has an annual revenue of $1.0M, founded in 2020. Headquartered in Singapore, with presence in Malaysia and Thailand. Has $1.4M in total funding, with 1 prior funding round.

### Venture Capital Summer Analyst at [The Hive Southeast Asia](https://www.linkedin.com/company/hivedatasea)

Jul 2024 - Sep 2024 (2 months) in Kuala Lumpur, Federal Territory of Kuala Lumpur, MY

Backed by Silicon Valley-based venture capital firm The Hive, Tuas Capital Partners, and Sunway Group. Early stage and sector agnostic.

Department: Finance & Accounting • Level: Specialist

The Hive Southeast Asia is a Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals company. The Hive Southeast Asia is a VC fund and co-creation studio that collaborates with entrepreneurs and corporations to create and launch startups that leverage data, AI, blockchain, and deep tech to drive disruption and new market opportunities. The Hive Southeast Asia employs 6 people (-16.7% YoY, -1 person), founded in 2021. Headquartered in Kuala Lumpur, Federal Territory of Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia.

### Venture Capital Intern at [Wu Song Capital](https://www.linkedin.com/company/wu-song-capital)

May 2024 - Jul 2024 (2 months)

Gained valuable exposure to finance.

Department: Finance & Accounting • Level: Intern

Wu Song Capital is a Investment Management company. Wu Song Capital is a boutique Venture Capital firm that invests in high-potential startups across Asia & AME via an accelerator programme. Wu Song Capital employs 1 person, founded in 2024. Headquartered in Singapore.

### Real Estate Agent at [Foreward Realty](https://www.linkedin.com/company/foreward-realty)

Jan 2024 - Mar 2024 (2 months)

Learnt more about sales and the real estate market in Malaysia.

Department: Real Estate • Level: Specialist

Foreward Realty. Foreward Realty is a licensed real estate agency built on vision, trust, and drive. They are dedicated to bettering property for all and aim to be a happy homebuyer at a time. Foreward Realty employs 17 people (+3.8% YoY, +2 people). Headquartered in Petaling Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia.

### Staff (Team Leader) at Envi Foundation

Jan 2022 - Feb 2022 (1 month)

Lead a team of 4 and orchestrate tasks to ensure peak task delivery. Manage customer relationships and assist on customer queries. Proficiency in Canva to produce digital marketing and education content, including videos and posters.

Department: Engineering and Technical • Level: Manager

## Education

2024 - 2026 (2 years) in Subang Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia

Taylor's University is a higher education institution. Taylor's is a university that offers various programs and opportunities for students to study and live in a new country. They also provide student exchange programs and have a well-balanced learning ecosystem and community. Taylor's University employs 1,271 people (+11.2% YoY, +233 people), founded in 2010. Headquartered in Subang Jaya, Selangor, Malaysia, operates in 30 countries (including Indonesia, United Kingdom, Singapore, India, and Australia).

### Diploma in Accounting, Finance at [University of Malaya](https://www.linkedin.com/school/unimalaya)

2021 - 2023 (2 years)

University of Malaya is an educational institution. Universiti Malaya is a university located in Malaya, Malaysia. They offer various academic programs and services to students and staff. The university has a vision and mission, leadership, board of directors, administration, and organizational chart. They also have various office offices and provide career opportunities. Universiti Malaya is focused on providing quality education and research opportunities. University of Malaya employs 3,430 people (+7.5% YoY, +568 people) and has an annual revenue of $227.6M. operates in 50 countries (including Malaysia, United Kingdom, Indonesia, India, and Bangladesh).

title: shannon choo | Mediator
text:
# Shannon Choo

Legal Counsel

Singapore (SG)

385 connections • 385 followers

## About

## Experience

Sep 2023 - Present (2 years and 8 months)

Department: Legal • Level: Specialist

Ministry of Social and Family Development, Singapore (MSF) is a government agency. Ministry of Social and Family Development (MSF) is a government organization that nurtures and builds lives together. They provide topics such as financial assistance and parenting resources. Ministry of Social and Family Development, Singapore (MSF) employs 1,128 people (+11.3% YoY, +175 people) and has an annual revenue of $11.0M, founded in 2012. Headquartered in Singapore, Singapore, operates in 9 countries (including Trinidad and Tobago, Oman, Australia, India, and Germany).

### Singapore Mediation Centre Accredited Mediator at [Singapore Mediation Centre](https://www.linkedin.com/company/singapore-mediation-centre) (Current)

Sep 2018 - Present (7 years and 2 months)

Department: Legal • Level: Specialist

Singapore Mediation Centre is a nonprofit organization. Singapore Mediation Centre (smc) is Singapore’s leading provider of alternative dispute resolution services. They offer mediation, adjudication, neutral evaluation, and resolving disputes involving families, infrastructure projects, and internet domain names. Singapore Mediation Centre employs 84 people (-1.7% YoY, -2 people), founded in 1997. Headquartered in Singapore, Singapore, operates in 10 countries (including Brunei, Taiwan, Indonesia, Israel, and Malaysia).

### Mediator at Foreign Domestic Worker Association for Social Support  and Training (“FAST”) (Current)

Mar 2020 - Present (5 years and 8 months)

Department: Legal • Level: Specialist

### Associate Director at [Kalco Law LLC](https://www.linkedin.com/company/kalco-law-llc)

Oct 2018 - Sep 2023 (4 years and 11 months)

Department: General Management • Level: Director

Kalco Law LLC is a Law Practice company. Kalco Law LLC is a full-service law firm that provides legal services in criminal defense & litigation, family & matrimonial dispute resolution, corporate & commercial private wealth & estate planning (wills & lpa) conveyancing. ### https://www.linkedin.com/posts/kiron-cheong-39a40897_sunday-musings-job-hazards-was-doing-activity-7372910489179398144-Lc08

Activity: Shannon Choo liked this

[Sunday Musings - Job Hazards] 

Was doing schoolwork with the Kiddo and realised why lawyers (read: me) make terrible teachers.

Every time he asked me a question, my answer was either “It depends”, or “ It isn’t clear.”

Apparently, that doesn’t go down well when you’re trying to figure out if plants need sunlight to grow or they just need light (as opposed to ONLY sunlight). This nuance is great for when I am caveating my advice at work, but not so great when a 9 year old just wants a straight answer (and quick so that homework doesn’t take up more precious Roblox time). In fact, sometimes (or rather most times) clients too, just want a straight answer.

### https://www.linkedin.com/posts/marrissa-karuna-6976241a4_excited-to-share-that-i-have-been-appointed-activity-7153025324547457024-5pZZ

Activity: Shannon Choo liked this

Excited to share that I have been appointed to The Law Society of Singapore’s 2024 Civil Practice Committee. 

In my years of practice thus far, I have had the opportunity to see civil practice evolve - one of main shifts was having to navigate the Rules of Court and then switching gears to navigate the (no longer) new Rules of Court instead. 

Even now, civil practice continues to evolve as stakeholders in the industry continue to consider issues of sustainability in the long-term, cost structures and ultimately, substantive fairness. 

I am grateful for the opportunity to play a part in the continued development of civil litigation, and look forward to being able to contribute through this committee.

Having put it off for as long as I can, I've finally gotten around to posting about myself on the Fortress Law company page. 

Since the feeling is already strange enough, I guess I might as well just go all the way and promote it on my own page... So here it is! https://lnkd.in/gZ_9KgB9 While you're at it, I'd love it if you'd follow our Firm's LinkedIn page. Thanks in advance! After a two week break, we're back with our #featurefriday . This time, we're happy to introduce Mark Yeo , a Director with the Firm!

🌟 Feature Friday Spotlight: Mark Yeo ⚖️
Mark is a dispute resolution lawyer, handling both criminal and civil matters. Before joining legal practice in end-2020, Mark spent three years in the Crime Division of the Attorney-General's Chambers (AGC). During this time, he prosecuted a wide range of cases in both the State Courts and the High Court. This included cases under the Penal Code, Misuse of Drugs Act, Workplace Safety and Health Act, and the Building Control Act. Notable cases include his involvement in a High Court trial related to the offence of Rape and the prosecution of parties involved in the 2017 PIE Viaduct collapse.

As Defence Counsel, Mark has successfully argued cases in every level of the Singapore criminal justice system. His experiences includes acting as lead counsel in a Magistrate’s Appeal where he succeeded in getting the appellant’s sentence for a sexual offence significantly reduced, while providing the court with the opportunity to clarify the sentencing framework for offences of sexual assault involving penetration. Mark also successfully argued the appeals in the Court of Appeal and High Court for offences of armed robbery and corruption respectively. 

In the realm of civil disputes, Mark has acted as lead counsel in a civil trial, where he successfully assisted the claimant in recovering monies owed to them for works done in a renovation project.

Glad I took some time off work to challenge myself with this! Was my first time moderating in Chinese and I couldn't have asked for a better panel to work with. Truly a meaningful and insightful session with Peggy Sarah Yee May Kuen and Kristine (: 处理或遭遇家庭暴力？[Dealing with or Encountering Family Violence?]
 
“I really appreciate her (Peggy Sarah Yee) sharing her experience and stories, they are invaluable for learning.”
“Can feel that she (Kristine Lam) is a very professional social worker. Really appreciated her practical input and compassionate approach.”
 
Moderated by Jen Xuekun Xu (Legal Professional, Avaloq Asia), joined by speakers, Peggy Sarah Yee May Kuen (Director, PY Legal LLC) and Kristine Lam (Principal Social Worker, Care Corner Singapore Ltd ), they provided invaluable insights into the root causes, dynamics, and impact of family violence, explore effective communication techniques, conflict resolution strategies, and resources available to break the cycle of abuse.

### https://www.linkedin.com/posts/srruthi-ilankathir-702a44a5_activity-7147192383246393344-hrhq

Activity: Shannon Choo liked this

Delighted to share that I have been included as one of ALB's Rising Stars 2023. Thank you Asian Legal Business for the recognition and ofcourse our clients for their generous feedback and continued support! 

Heres to a great 2024 ahead! Happy New Year all! We are delighted to announce that our Directors, Jaspreet Sachdev and Srruthi Ilankathir , have been recognised in Asian Legal Business (ALB)'s Rising Stars 2023. 
 
ALB Asia's Rising Stars is an annual list that profiles lawyers under 40 years of age who are doing high-quality work, and in the process earning accolades from their colleagues, superiors, and clients. 
 
Our Executive Chairman, Davinder Singh SC commends Jaspreet's "ability to assimilate complex issues, his reading of situations, including of witnesses under cross-examination, and his ability to hone in on the things that matter make him an invaluable resource and a pleasure to work with" and says that "clients appreciate the fact that Jaspreet is very adept at strategizing and is always on top of the case and the facts".
 
Our CEO, Jaikanth Shankar, describes Jaspreet as “an extremely intelligent lawyer who has a bright future ahead of him”, as someone who “offers practical and commercial solutions to difficult issues” and as a “very personable lawyer”.
 
Jaspreet has received many accolades from our clients, including that he "gets along well with the client's team", "is a very committed lawyer with deep knowledge of the law" and it is "an enjoyable experience working together with him". 
 
Our Executive Chairman, Davinder Singh SC describes Srruthi as a “highly intelligent, dedicated and very focused lawyer [who] is extremely hard-working, has a very good eye for detail and can be trusted to carefully review voluminous documents to identify critical points” and says that she is a “pleasure to work with”. 
 
Our CEO, Jaikanth Shankar, describes Srruthi as someone who “reads the room extremely well”, is “on top of the facts” and who prepares “excellent written submissions and briefs”.
 
Srruthi has also received many accolades from our clients, including that she is a “highly efficient professional with eye for detail”, “exceptional legal professional” with a “profound understanding of arbitration laws”, “remarkable ability to craft persuasive arguments”, “strategize”, and “advocate persuasively” and has a “drive to deliver the best outcomes [that] is impressive and highly commendable” 
 
Please click on the link below to view the November 2023 issue of ALB Asia (at p.21 and p.23) for more information: https://lnkd.in/gJM8R_Py https://lnkd.in/giUqBA_m We are very grateful to our clients for their continuous support.
